---

title: "Example Analysis"
author: "Matthew O'Dell"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-functions
#| include: false

source("../R/helpers.R")
```

## Example data

```{r}
#| label: example-data

example_data <- data.frame(
  species = c("Chinook", "Coho", "Sockeye", "Pink"),
  count = c(18, 12, 24, 15)
)

example_data
```

## Missing values

```{r}
count_missing(example_data)
```

## Example figure

```{r}
#| label: example-figure
#| fig-cap: "Example salmon observations by species."

ggplot(
  example_data,
  aes(x = species, y = count)
) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    x = "Species",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
